properties.name: aria-start-label
properties.description: Aria label for the start thumb

properties.name: aria-end-label
properties.description: Aria label for the end thumb

properties.name: end
properties.description: The current end value of the element.

properties.name: max
properties.description: The maximum value of the range.

properties.name: min
properties.description: The minimum value of the range.

properties.name: pin
properties.description: Show current values on the thumbs.

properties.name: start
properties.description: The current start value of the element.

properties.name: step
properties.description: Value to increment or decrement via arrow keys, mouse click or drag.

events.name: input:start
events.description: Event emitted when the start value changes

events.name: input:end
events.description: Event emitted when the end value changes

events.name: input
events.description: Event emitted when either the start or end value changes.

events.name: change
events.description: Event emitted when either the start or end value changes.
